choices.text: Compression heating: bow shock compresses air to 10,000°C+. Convection + radiation transfer to vehicle. Blunt body shape detaches shock further from vehicle → less heat to skin. Apollo deliberate blunt design.

Thin Mars atmosphere (~1% Earth) → less drag → vehicle still fast near surface. Sequence: heat shield (5.5 km/s → 400 m/s) → supersonic parachute → rockets (Curiosity's Sky Crane). 7 minutes of terror; multiple sequential failure points.
